@sigil v0 hybrid
G: loadUser async_await promisify(db.findUser) await(audit.log) await(cache.set)
C: !id → next(new Error('missing_id')) ∧ !user → next(new Error('not_found'))
P: db.findUser(id) → one_place_map(err→next(err))
V: same_order ∧ one_next(err) ∧ preserve(next(null, user))
R: ! change validation order ∧ ! alter error mapping placement
A: wrap callback APIs in Promise helpers; keep `next` as the final bridge
[AUDIT]
Minimal behavior preserved; single db error bridge retained.
